name: camoufox
description: Camoufox navigator: current Python usage from live docs (camoufox.com), launch options (humanize, geoip, os, proxy, block_images, config), the Playwright-Firefox integration it exposes, and fingerprint injection. Includes /camoufox:check and a Camoufox-keyword reminder hook. Defers general third-party doc verification to api-docs-first.
